docket_entries.description: TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF EXHIBIT TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
MINUTES FOR DEC-05-2018 9:55 AM

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2018 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF DEC-05-2018 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.
ORDER OEX HEARING OFF CALENDAR. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELBAZ, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STAHL, JOEL AKA. JEFF VEGA $8,360.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,435.00, $8360.00 AS A SECURITY DEPOSIT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1950.5, FOR THE REASON STATED IN THE ATTACHED. NOTHING IN THIS JUDGMENT AFFECTS DEFENDANT'S ABILITY TO RECOVER THE SECURITY DEPOSIT UPON TERMINATION OF THE TENANCY PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1950.5. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT ELBAZ, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM APPELLANT STAHL, JOEL AKA. JEFF VEGA $8,360.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,435.00, TENANT JOEL STAHL TO PAY OWNER MICHAEL ELBAZ SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $8360. PLUS COSTS $75. FOR A TOTAL OF $8435 PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE OF PROCEDURE 1950.5 TENTANT MAY RECOVER ANY BALANCE I NSECURITY DEPOSIT AFTER TERMINATION OF TENANCY. FAILURE TO PAY SECURITY DEPOSIT IS NOT GROUNDS FOR EVICTION. SEE RENT ORDINANCE SECTION 12.20 SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY FILED BY RESPONDENT ELBAZ, MICHAEL SERVED DEC-05-2018, MAIL AS TO APPELLANT STAHL, JOEL AKA. JEFF VEGA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT STAHL, JOEL AKA. JEFF VEGA
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT STAHL, JOEL AKA. JEFF VEGA MAILED TO RESPONDENT ELBAZ, MICHAEL
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2018;- TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-05-2018 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY MARK CHERNEV APPEARED AND INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE MATTER HAS BEEN SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
